case_title: STARR INDEMNITY & LIABILITY COMPANY VS. UNIONAMERICA INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) UNIONAMERICA INSURANCE COMPANY.
